overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle following a red car through the futuristic Night City during golden hour. The drive traverses elevated highways, commercial intersections, and neon-lit underpasses with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass transitioning to open road

events.description: exits covered overpass into open highway with full view of downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: following a red compact car through the underpass and emerging into sunlight on the highway

notable_agents.action: red car maintaining steady speed ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead casting deep shadows
large cylindrical industrial storage tanks with metallic finish
compact red vehicle being followed as the primary focal point
green street sign indicating Columbaria street suspended over road
tall futuristic towers with reflective glass facades catching golden hour light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in deep shadow. As the vehicle emerges around 6 seconds, the scene opens to reveal the futuristic city skyline with towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by warm golden hour sunlight. The camera follows a red car steadily through the transition from enclosed to open space.

events.description: enters elevated highway section with neon-lit guardrails and monorail tracks overhead

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway maintaining distance from the red car ahead

entered.detail: highway barrier with glowing cyan neon strips running along its length
elevated train track structure spanning across the highway above
green directional sign for Mission street suspended over the roadway

segments.scene_description: Driving along an open elevated highway bathed in golden sunlight. The road features glowing neon guardrails on the right and monorail tracks overhead. The industrial tanks from the previous segment remain visible on the left while the red car moves further ahead into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with traffic control

events.description: approaching red traffic light at major intersection, slowing to stop behind red car
traffic light changes to green, vehicles begin moving through intersection
executing right turn at intersection onto commercial street

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light behind the red car, then proceeding through intersection and turning right

notable_agents.action: black sedan crossing the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red then changing to green
distinctive tall building with X-shaped structural bracing on facade
tropical palm trees lining the street corner

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection dominated by a distinctive X-framed skyscraper. The vehicle stops at a red light, waits for the signal to change, then executes a right turn. Palm trees become visible on the left as the car enters a more commercial district with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with elevated highways

events.description: enters Vista Del Rey commercial district with vibrant rainbow neon facades
turning left beneath elevated highway structure into underpass

agents.ego_description: navigating through the colorful commercial street then turning left under the overpass

entered.detail: street sign indicating the Vista Del Rey district
building covered in prismatic rainbow-colored neon lighting
large holographic advertisement displaying pink and purple imagery
massive green structural columns supporting the overhead highway
older brick structures with ground-level shops and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through the vibrant Vista Del Rey district characterized by rainbow neon facades and massive digital billboards. The street is lined with green support pillars for the elevated highway above. After passing through this colorful commercial area, the vehicle turns left beneath the highway into a darker underpass section.

scene_state.functional_zone: shadowed underpass beneath multi-level highway interchange

events.description: enters dark underpass beneath highway, switching to artificial lighting only
briefly emerges into patch of sunlight before re-entering shadow

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dimly lit underpass with brake lights visible ahead

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of the highway blocking natural light
concrete walls covered in colorful street art and graffiti
complex intertwining highway ramps and bridges overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a shadowed underpass beneath the highway interchange. Natural light is completely blocked by concrete overpasses above, creating a moody atmosphere illuminated only by street lamps and vehicle lights. The walls feature graffiti art while the road winds through the concrete jungle of support pillars and ramps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed concrete underpass into the sun-drenched heights of a futuristic city before descending back into a moody urban canyon. It begins in deep shadow beneath a massive highway overpass, emerging into the warm golden hour light to reveal a skyline of towering glass skyscrapers while following a red car. As the vehicle glides along an elevated highway with neon guardrails and overhead monorail tracks, the scene shifts toward a major intersection dominated by a distinctive X-framed skyscraper. After a brief stop at a red light, the camera turns right into the vibrant Vista Del Rey district, passing rainbow neon facades and massive digital billboards lined with green support pillars. The journey finally turns left, leaving the colorful commercial district behind to enter a dark, graffiti-covered underpass where natural light is replaced by the glow of street lamps and vehicle lights.
